sources.title: RockAuto Touch-Up Paint catalog
sources.notes: RockAuto describes currently cataloged service products and fitments, not Chevrolet factory color availability. A model-year page can omit most official colors. A universal product can appear without any paint code and must never become a code candidate. Retailer labels can differ from Chevrolet's official model-year color names. Price, stock, and product presence are volatile and are not historical availability evidence. No public catalog API or catalog-data reuse license was identified during this audit.
